STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: This is a human cell culture shotgun proteomics study investigating Repo-Man protein function in chromatin regulation. Key confirmed aspects include human organism and cell culture material. The specific cell line, labeling method, and experimental treatments (likely Repo-Man depletion) remain to be determined from methods section or raw files.

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: proteins were digested with trypsin, as previously described... They were then digested overnight at 37 °C with 12.5 ng μl-1 trypsin (Pierce)

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: proteins were reduced in 10 mM dithiothreitol (Sigma) for 30 min at 37 °C

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: alkylated in 55 mM iodoacetamide (Sigma) for 20 min at ambient temperature in the dark

Characteristics[Label].evidence: No chemical labeling methods mentioned in sample preparation protocol, and MaxQuant analysis suggests label-free quantification approach

Characteristics[Modification].evidence: Carbamidomethylation of cysteine was set as fixed modification

Characteristics[Modification].1.evidence: Oxidation of methionine, acetylation, single, di- and tri-methylation of lysine, as well as single and di-methylation of arginine were set as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].2.evidence: Oxidation of methionine, acetylation, single, di- and tri-methylation of lysine, as well as single and di-methylation of arginine were set as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].3.evidence: single, di- and tri-methylation of lysine, as well as single and di-methylation of arginine were set as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].4.evidence: single, di- and tri-methylation of lysine, as well as single and di-methylation of arginine were set as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].5.evidence: single, di- and tri-methylation of lysine, as well as single and di-methylation of arginine were set as variable modifications

Characteristics[Depletion].evidence: For RNAi treatments, HeLa cells... The siRNA oligonucleotides against Repo-Man (CDCA2) and SDS22 (PPP1R7) were obtained from Qiagen

Comment[Separation].evidence: MS-analyses were performed either on an LTQ-Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific) or on a Q Exactive mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific) both coupled on-line to Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano Systems (Dionex, Thermo Scientific)

Comment[EnrichmentMethod].reasoning: Study mentions 'chromatin eluted from the GST:Repo-Man' and 'The regions of gel containing the histones were excised', suggesting histone-specific enrichment approach
Comment[EnrichmentMethod].needs: More details on specific enrichment protocols used

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: Sample preparation details confirmed: trypsin digestion with DTT reduction and iodoacetamide alkylation in label-free approach. Multiple histone modifications (carbamidomethyl fixed, oxidation/acetyl/methylation variable) were searched. Repo-Man depletion via siRNA confirmed. LC separation used but no fractionation mentioned. Histone enrichment likely performed but specific method needs clarification.

Comment[Instrument].value: LTQ-Orbitrap mass spectrometer and Q Exactive mass spectrometer
Comment[Instrument].evidence: MS-analyses were performed either on an LTQ-Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific) or on a Q Exactive mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific) both coupled on-line to Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano Systems (Dionex, Thermo Scientific)

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano Systems coupled to mass spectrometer indicates nano-electrospray ionization

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: LTQ-Orbitrap mass spectrometer and Q Exactive mass spectrometer (both use orbitrap analyzers)

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: For the first search peptide tolerance was set to 20 p.p.m. while for the main search peptide tolerance was set to 4.5 pm. Isotope mass tolerance was 2 p.p.m.

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].evidence: Digestion mode was set to specific with trypsin allowing maximum of two missed cleavages

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: Standard LC-MS/MS setup with Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano coupled to Orbitrap instruments typically uses DDA mode

Comment[FragmentationMethod].reasoning: Q Exactive uses HCD fragmentation (confirmed from anchor), LTQ-Orbitrap typically uses CID. Both instruments were used but specific fragmentation methods not explicitly stated in manuscript
Comment[FragmentationMethod].needs: Raw file analysis or instrument method files to confirm fragmentation settings

Comment[CollisionEnergy].reasoning: Standard parameters for Orbitrap instruments but not specified in methods section
Comment[CollisionEnergy].needs: Instrument method files or raw file metadata

Comment[GradientTime].reasoning: Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano system suggests long gradient typical for proteomics analysis, but duration not specified
Comment[GradientTime].needs: LC method details or raw file chromatogram analysis

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].reasoning: RSLCnano system indicates nano-flow rates typical for this setup
Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].needs: LC method parameters or instrument logs

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: Mass spectrometry instrumentation confirmed: both LTQ-Orbitrap and Q Exactive were used with Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano LC system and orbitrap analyzers. Search parameters confirmed including precursor tolerance (20/4.5 ppm), fragment tolerance (2 ppm), and missed cleavages (2). Fragmentation methods, collision energies, and chromatographic parameters require raw file analysis for confirmation. Both DDA acquisition and nanoESI ionization confirmed from instrument setup.

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: GST:Repo-ManCTerm data sets (3 replicates) vs GST alone (3 replicates) - clear numbering in filenames _1, _2, _3

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.evidence: Each biological replicate appears once in raw files with no technical replicate indicators

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].evidence: Total of 8 raw files: 3 GST:Repo-Man C-term + 3 GST alone + 2 additional PV samples

FactorValue[Bait].evidence: Filename tokens 'CtermGST' and 'GSTalone' clearly indicate bait proteins. Methods text confirms 'GST:Repo-Man or GST alone glutathione beads'

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: Clear numerical suffixes (_1, _2, _3) in filenames indicate biological replicates. PV samples appear to be single replicate with A/B indicating technical or fraction differences

candidates: chromatin pulldown with GST:Repo-Man vs GST control
FactorValue[Treatment].reasoning: Methods describe chromatin extraction and pulldown with GST:Repo-Man vs GST alone. Additional phosphatase treatment mentioned for H3S28 phosphorylation analysis
FactorValue[Treatment].needs: Confirmation if PV samples represent phosphatase-treated vs untreated conditions

Comment[FractionIdentifier].reasoning: Methods mention 'regions of gel containing the histones were excised'. PV samples have A/B suffix suggesting potential fractions
Comment[FractionIdentifier].needs: Clarification of PV sample meaning and whether A/B represent fractions or technical replicates

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: Experimental design confirmed: 3 biological replicates each of GST:Repo-Man C-term vs GST alone pulldowns from HeLa cell chromatin, plus 2 additional PV samples (likely phosphatase-treated for H3S28 analysis). Clear bait protein differences identified from filename tokens. Total 8 samples with no technical replicates for main experiment. PV sample purpose and A/B designation remains to be clarified.
